step_by_step_reasoning: We trace the architecture flow chronologically: ingest starts with a user upload to S3, which triggers orchestration. The workflow splits into media transcoding via MediaConvert and metadata extraction using Lambda. A second analysis pipeline orchestrates AI services (Rekognition, Transcribe, Comprehend) to enrich metadata stored in DynamoDB. Finally, the consolidated data is ingested into Reach Engine running on EC2 and EKS.

graph.name: Media to Cloud Orchestration with Reach Engine
graph.notes: Serverless media ingest and enrichment pipeline that extracts metadata, transcodes video, runs AI/ML sentiment and content analysis, and stores temporary metadata in DynamoDB before feeding a Reach Engine platform hosted on EC2 and EKS.

nodes.name: Web User
nodes.notes: Users uploading content and viewing media/metadata in the browser.

nodes.name: Input S3 Bucket
nodes.notes: Receives the uploaded raw video and stores processed proxies.

nodes.name: Ingest Orchestrator
nodes.notes: Orchestrates transcoding and basic metadata extraction.

nodes.name: AWS Elemental MediaConvert
nodes.notes: Generates low-res browser-compatible proxies from source videos.

nodes.name: Metadata Extractor
nodes.notes: Extracts technical checksums and media information.

nodes.name: Analysis Orchestrator
nodes.notes: Orchestrates AI services for content enrichment.

nodes.name: Amazon Rekognition
nodes.notes: Identifies celebrities, violence, and tags contents with timestamps.

nodes.name: Amazon Transcribe
nodes.notes: Converts audio from content to text.

nodes.name: Amazon Comprehend
nodes.notes: Analyzes transcribed text for entities and profanity.

nodes.name: Temporary Metadata Store
nodes.notes: Stores intermediate metadata temporarily before final ingest.

nodes.name: Reach Engine Portal
nodes.notes: Host environment for Reach Engine front-end and web interfaces.

nodes.name: Reach Engine Orchestration
nodes.notes: Kubernetes cluster executing core processing, search, and orchestration logic.

edges.notes: User uploads raw video file to input bucket
S3 upload triggers the ingest Step Functions workflow
Outputs the web-playable proxy back to S3
Triggers lambda functions to extract technical metadata
Saves extracted checksums and basic technical metadata
Triggers the second analysis step function after basic ingest finishes
Triggers computer vision analysis on video content
Sends extracted transcript text to Comprehend for NLP analysis
Saves NLP extracted entity and sentiment data
Triggers bulk ingest of compiled metadata into Reach Engine
Imports metadata to frontend search portal
